---
title: "ENVS 193DS - Spring Final"
author: "Sascha Roberts"
date: "2026-06-09"
format: pdf
---

# Github Repo

My repo [here](https://github.com/Sascharr16/ENVS-193DS_spring-2026_final/tree/main)

# Set Up

## Load packages

```{r}
#| label: load_packages
#| message: false



```

## Load data

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| message: false



```
